messages.required: Supplier, item number, barcode, name, purchase price, and retail price are required.
messages.priceInvalid: Purchase price and retail price must be valid numbers greater than or equal to 0.
messages.manualRetailPriceInvalid: Retail price must be greater than 0 when auto pricing is off.
messages.refreshFailedAfterCreate: Product was created, but details failed to refresh. Search manually.

messages.keywordRequired: Enter a barcode, item number, or product code.
messages.targetStoreUnavailable: You cannot access store {{storeCode}}, so the automatic lookup was stopped.
messages.noResultDescription: No result matched "{{value}}". Check the barcode, item number, product code, or try another store.
messages.lookupErrorDescription: Something went wrong while looking up the product. Please try again later.
messages.lookupNetworkError: Network connection failed. Please check your network and try again.
messages.lookupTimeout: Lookup timed out. Please check your connection and try again.
messages.lookupServerError: Server temporarily unavailable ({{status}}). Please try again later.
messages.clearanceSaveFailed: Failed to save the clearance price.
messages.setCodeSaveFailed: Failed to save the set barcode.
messages.multiCodeSaveFailed: Failed to save the multi-code record.
messages.emptyStorePrice: There is no store price record for this product.
messages.emptyPrompt: Enter a barcode, item number, or product code to start.
messages.cameraTip: Align the barcode with the center of the frame.
messages.printerRequired: Select a label printer in Settings first.
messages.printerPaused: Printer connection is paused. Reconnect it in Settings first.
messages.discountPrintUnavailable: This product has no discount data to print.
messages.clearancePrintUnavailable: This product has no clearance data to print.

productTypeDescription.normal: Regular products use the main barcode's own store price.
productTypeDescription.set: Set retail can be customized, and purchase price follows the main barcode retail-to-cost ratio.
productTypeDescription.multi: Multi barcode retail and purchase prices always stay aligned with the current store price of the main barcode.

camera.title: Scan a product
camera.needPermissionDescription: Enable camera access to scan products directly from the product lookup page.

autoPricingConfirm.title: Auto price changed
autoPricingConfirm.description: The automatic retail price for {{name}} ({{code}}) has changed.
autoPricingConfirm.discountHint: Confirm to update the retail price and refresh the regular label.
